name: Clear Creek Park
description: Clear Creek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Richmond, IN. There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Forest Hills Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Forest Hills Country Club in Richmond, IN! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Lakeside Tennis Court
description: Lakeside Tennis Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Richmond, IN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Richmond Indiana YMCA
description: Richmond Indiana YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Richmond, IN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Richmond Senior Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Richmond Senior Community Center in Richmond, IN! There are 3 asphalt and wood courts. 2 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Sunshower Country Club, Inc.
description: Sunshower is a family-oriented nudist resort.  Come and play pickleball, shower, swim, hike or just chill.  Visit our website to view the grounds, etc.
fees: Fee required — $50 for a day visit which includes admission to play pickleball, hike, swim or just relax.  We also have camping and rentals.
